name: Mexican Bean & Cheese Pockets
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Monterey jack cheese with jalapenos, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the tortillas in a microwave (or wrap them in foil and bake at 350°F for 5 minutes).
2. Place the warmed tortillas side by side on a work surface.
3. Put a heaping tablespoon of warm refried beans in the center of each tortilla.
4. Top with 1 tablespoon of sliced scallions, then 1 heaping tablespoon of shredded cheese.
5. Fold two opposite sides of each tortilla toward the center, overlapping slightly.
6. Fold the remaining two sides toward the middle.
7. Heat a large heavy skillet over medium-low heat and brush with oil.
8. Place the folded tortillas (pockets) on the skillet, smooth side up.
9. Cook for 5 minutes per side or until golden and crisp. Keep warm in the oven while cooking the remaining pockets.
10. Serve hot with salsa for dipping.
